sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.rendered_content:
KIM posted $2.14B in revenue (5.1% YoY) and $585M in net income (42.3% YoY) for 2025-12-31. The profitability profile is defined by operating margin of 36.0% and net margin of 27.3%, framing the earnings quality behind the headline figures.

Cash generation is anchored by $1.12B in operating cash flow (11.4% YoY), which converts to $1.10B in free cash flow. Capital expenditures of $18M (0.9% of revenue) show the reinvestment burden required to sustain the current operating base. The conversion of earnings into operating cash flow suggests the reported result is supported by cash generation rather than dominated by accruals.

Cash generation is anchored by $1.12B in operating cash flow (11.4% YoY), which converts to $1.10B in free cash flow. sections.title: Trend Analysis
sections.rendered_content:
### Capital Expenditures
Capital Expenditures is currently $18M with -86.1% CAGR. Capital Expenditures has declined at a -86.1% CAGR.

### Operating Income
Operating Income is currently $771M with 11.0% CAGR. Operating Income has grown at a 11.0% CAGR.

### Total Stockholders' Equity
Total Stockholders' Equity is currently $10.5B with 7.7% CAGR. Total Stockholders' Equity has grown at a 7.7% CAGR.

### Operating Cash Flow
Operating Cash Flow is currently $1.12B with 7.3% CAGR. Operating Cash Flow has grown at a 7.3% CAGR.
